title: 440 x 6-14 mm Sticky Back Crystal Gems - Adhesive Diamante Rhinestones Jewels
features: 440 Faceted Gems on four sheets in Pink, Purple, Red and Silver - 110 gems per sheet
Flat Back with self adhesive backing
description: Product description Four packs of adhesive jewels are constructed from PVC and polystyrene and feature an assortment of self-adhesive jewels, These packs of Self Adhesive Jewels contains approximately five hundred jewels each that are constructed from acrylic and have a diameter of 6 -14 mm. Ideal for a wide range of art and craft projects, including card making and scrap booking. Suitable for ages 5+. Safety Warning Choking hazard. Not suitable for children under 36 months. Not recommended for children under 5 years. Adult supervision is required at all times. Contains small parts that could present a choking hazard.
